creator: Allan Campbell
description: This episode of KOOP Radio's People United  features historian Madeline Y. Hsu on her book The Good Immigrants: How the Yellow Peril Became the Model Minority , an examination of the relationship between changes in US policies and perceptions of Chinese immigrants.  She spoke at the Asian American Resource Center in Austin, Texas, on September 12, 2015.
